Calculate FOV from telescope + camera (instead of entering it manually)
Gaia field stars (optional — overlay guide/field stars on the FOV diagram)
Paste here a CSV exported from the Gaia Archive (columns ra, dec, phot_g_mean_mag). Each object card below will show the ready-to-copy ADQL query for its own field, sized to the current FOV.
no stars loaded
How to get the CSV (step-by-step)
Anonymous queries have a row limit — register for free on the archive if you need faint magnitudes or a wide field. Make sure to pick CSV (not VOTable/FITS) when downloading.
Uses the latitude/longitude above · cloud forecast covers ~16 days ahead
Object data (RA, Dec, size required)
—
Positional calculations use low-order formulas (JPL low-precision Sun, standard GMST/LST). Accuracy is suitable for visual/imaging planning, not precision pointing. Object data (sizes, channels) from NGC/IC/Sharpless catalogs and amateur literature estimates.
